publishedAbstract: * rook-ceph-crashcollector pods keep creating repeatedly on each worker node: ~~~ rook-ceph-crashcollector-worker0.example.com-dqhz9 1/1 Running 1 48m rook-ceph-crashcollector-worker0.example.com-qm4xf 0/1 Terminating 0 4s rook-ceph-crashcollector-worker1.example.com-4fn67 1/1 Running 0 69s rook-ceph-crashcollector-worker1.example.com-pmp8v 0/1 Terminating 0 1s rook-ceph-crashcollector-worker2.example.com-phsk5 0/1 Init:0/2 0 0s rook-ceph-crashcollector-worker2.example.com-pjz4l 0/1 Terminating 0 4s rook-ceph-crashcollector-worker2.example.com-rlqf5 1/1 Running 1 48m rook-ceph-crashcollector-worker3.example.com-5hbx5 1/1 Running 0 7m18s rook-ceph-crashcollector-worker3.example.com-7zndj 0/1 Terminating 0 3s rook-ceph-crashcollector-worker4.example.com-bpk5f 1/1 Running 0 19m rook-ceph-crashcollector-worker4.example.com-xqg9z 0/1 Terminating 0 2s rook-ceph-crashcollector-worker5.example.com-bdbhj 1/1 Running 0 89s rook-ceph-crashcollector-worker5.example.com-g4rj5 0/1 Terminating 0 2s ~~~
publishedTitle: rook-ceph-crashcollector pods keep creating repeatedly on each worker node
